subsection.heading: Minimum allotment
subsection.chapeau: Subject to the extent of amounts made available in appropriations Acts, the amount of an allotment under section 300d–11(a) of this title for a State for a fiscal year shall be the greater of—

paragraph.content: the amount determined under subsection (b)(1); and

$250,000 in the case of each of the several States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, and $50,000 in the case of each of the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands.

paragraph.heading: In general
paragraph.chapeau: The amount referred to in subsection (a)(1) for a State for a fiscal year is the sum of—

subparagraph.content: an amount determined under paragraph (2); and

paragraph.heading: Amount relating to population
paragraph.chapeau: The amount referred to in subparagraph (A) of paragraph (1) for a State for a fiscal year is the product of—

subparagraph.content: an amount equal to 80 percent of the amounts appropriated under section 300d–32(a) of this title for the fiscal year and available for allotment under section 300d–11(a) of this title; and

subparagraph.chapeau: a percentage equal to the quotient of—

clause.content: an amount equal to the population of the State; divided by
an amount equal to the population of all States.

paragraph.heading: Amount relating to square mileage
paragraph.chapeau: The amount referred to in subparagraph (B) of paragraph (1) for a State for a fiscal year is the product of—

subparagraph.content: an amount equal to 20 percent of the amounts appropriated under section 300d–32(a) of this title for the fiscal year and available for allotment under section 300d–11(a) of this title; and

subparagraph.chapeau: a percentage equal to the quotient of—

clause.content: an amount equal to the lesser of 266,807 and the amount of the square mileage of the State; divided by
an amount equal to the sum of the respective amounts determined for the States under clause (i).

subsection.heading: Disposition of certain funds appropriated for allotments

content.p: Amounts described in paragraph (2) shall, in accordance with paragraph (3), be allotted by the Secretary to States receiving payments under section 300d–11(a) of this title for the fiscal year (other than any State referred to in paragraph (2)(C)).

paragraph.heading: Type of amounts
paragraph.chapeau: The amounts referred to in paragraph (1) are any amounts made available pursuant to 300d–32(b)(3) of this title that are not paid under section 300d–11(a) of this title to a State as a result of—

subparagraph.content: the failure of the State to submit an application under section 300d–17 of this title;
the failure, in the determination of the Secretary, of the State to prepare within a reasonable period of time such application in compliance with such section; or
the State informing the Secretary that the State does not intend to expend the full amount of the allotment made for the State.

paragraph.heading: Amount
paragraph.chapeau: The amount of an allotment under paragraph (1) for a State for a fiscal year shall be an amount equal to the product of—

subparagraph.content: an amount equal to the amount described in paragraph (2) for the fiscal year involved; and
the percentage determined under subsection (b)(2) for the State.
